description: Hanaja is a service marketplace that connects people who need reliable help with trusted helpers in their area.
highlights: Conducted a technical audit and advised leadership on a rebuild to resolve systemic issues, achieving a more scalable application with a well-structured API design pattern and file-based navigation.
Led the redesign and implementation of the application using TypeScript, Expo, and TamaGUI.
Applied secure development practices and scalable design patterns, with automated end-to-end testing using Playwright to ensure reliability and prevent regressions.

description: NaijaShop is a grocery shopping and delivery platform that connects customers, riders, and vendors in one ecosystem.
highlights: Owned development of the customer and rider mobile apps, plus vendor and internal operations dashboards, building core interfaces across mobile and web.
Instrumented event tracking with Mixpanel and error monitoring with Sentry, and led build, signing, and deployment pipelines to the App Store and Google Play Store.

description: GalaxyFi is a fintech platform that combines traditional fiat services with Web3-enabled financial experiences.
highlights: Implemented secure application architecture and best practices, strengthening authentication flows, data protection mechanisms, and secure API communication.
Designed and developed admin dashboard modules to enable internal monitoring and streamline administrative workflows.

description: Squad by GTCO is a fintech solution that helps SMEs handle digital payments and commerce operations more efficiently.
highlights: Built a vendor directory app for GTCO Fashion Week, helping over 700,000 fashion enthusiasts navigate the event.
Improved cross-breakpoint responsiveness and optimized SVG rendering, while offloading static assets to a CDN for faster global delivery and smoother visual performance.

description: Nester Verify is a real-time KYC verification platform that helps businesses validate customer identity and compliance quickly.
highlights: Contributed to a microfrontend architecture, building pixel-perfect, accessible components and integrating backend services via typed REST and GraphQL clients.
Automated CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, including build optimization, test gating, and deployment workflows for faster, safer releases.

description: Data Fellows is a talent and collaboration hub that connects AI engineers with organizations seeking specialized expertise.
highlights: Developed a role-based portal for data engineers and potential hirers, handling complex state management efficiently.
Built full-stack features with authentication, role-based access, secure payment, and OpenAI-powered matchmaking.

description: Autogon AI is a drag-and-drop AI platform for designing, testing, and deploying intelligent workflows with less complexity.
highlights: Integrated RESTful APIs across systems, implementing caching strategies to improve performance and reduce redundant network requests.
Owned and developed products including Medgnosis and Agrointel, driving end-to-end frontend and backend feature delivery.
Improved organic search performance by applying technical SEO standards on the company website.

description: TankUp is a mobility-focused platform that helps motorists find fuel stations, compare prices, and make better route decisions in real time.
highlights: Developed fuel station and price tracking apps with real-time location sync via Google Maps, guiding motorists to fuel, gas, and CNG stations.
Owned mobile app and admin dashboard development and deployment to Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
